pharma.title: GLP-1 impact: Jefferies sees these 3 stocks as winners in the race for Ozempic, Wegovy generics
pharma.summary: Indian drug makers are launching affordable generic Semaglutide, the active ingredient in popular weight-loss drugs. Sun Pharma, Lupin, and Torrent Pharma are identified as potential market leaders. Despite initial stockouts online, companies are adjusting...
pharma.thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.

providers.title: CureMeAbroad building global medical tourism platform
providers.summary: Pune-based startup CureMeAbroad is revolutionizing medical tourism with an AI-driven discovery platform for high-value patients from the US, UK, and Australia.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: Healthcare sector remains largely unaffected by the West Asia war: Industry body NATHEALTH
providers.summary: While NATHEALTH reports a stable outlook for Indian hospitals amid the West Asia conflict, medical device manufacturers (AiMeD) are seeking urgent fiscal relief due to a 50% rise in critical plastic costs.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

diagnostics.title: Silent epidemic: 60% CKD patients unaware of their condition, finds study
diagnostics.summary: Using point-of-care tests and digital tools in local primary health centres, the researchers screened nearly 2,000 people in both urban pockets and rural CKD hotspot areas.
diagnostics.thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.

diagnostics.title: War impact: Supply snarls hit liquid helium used in MRI scanners & for chip-making
diagnostics.summary: While NATHEALTH leaders highlight a $1 trillion opportunity in raising India's Health-Adjusted Life Expectancy (HALE), the industry must first navigate rising costs and supply chain disruptions caused by the ongoing Middle East conflict.
diagnostics.thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.
